title: melastoma robustum
intro: Melastoma robustum, also known as the 'Tengriling', is a plant species found in the Himalayan region, particularly in Nepal and Bhutan. It is a type of flowering plant used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and boosting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, Melastoma robustum is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
